prompt:
A printed shell transcript page resting beside a keyboard and terminal-lit workstation, showing the visual structure of a command session with short lines, prompts, and outputs in sequence. It should feel technical and reproducible, with no readable words.

Photorealistic 512×512 image with soft desk lighting, realistic paper and keyboard textures, no logos, no readable text, and no identifiable faces. Keep the page centered and uncluttered.
